message:
fix: return errors from getTrackedIssues instead of nil (gt-uryn7)

getTrackedIssues() was returning nil on both subprocess error and JSON
parse error, making it impossible for callers to distinguish between
'no tracked issues' and 'query failed'. This caused silent degradation
where completed convoys wouldn't auto-close and stranded convoys
wouldn't be detected when bd dep list fails.

Changed signature to return ([]trackedIssueInfo, error) in both
convoy.go and fetcher.go. All callers now handle errors: functions
that return error propagate it; loop callers log warnings and skip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
